title: BioFirewall: a rule-governed, genome-writing-native biosecurity middleware that supervises agentic design AI
description: A defensive, design-stage screen for agentic genome-writing AI. BioFirewall intercepts a genome-writing plan in-workflow and returns allow / flag-for-review / refuse across five genome-writing-native axes (cargo, locus, edit-type, germline, scale), with cited evidence, a calibrated false-refuse ceiling, a competence-conditioned confidence, a signed design passport, and a tamper-evident audit log. Open-data-only; safe proxies; no hazard sequences; artifact-decides-not-framing.
notes: Zenodo DOI to be minted by the author by connecting this GitHub repository to Zenodo and publishing a release. The restricted/local-only data (COSMIC, OncoKB, VISDB, controlled-access integration-site data) is NOT part of the deposit; only the open code + open vendored data + frozen pre-registration.
